song.title: Majesty (Here I Am)
song.author: Martin Smith / Stuart Garrard
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B
song.lyrics:
[V1] .Em D C G C Here I am, humbled by Your Majesty, .G D Covered by Your grace so free .Em D C G C Here I am, knowing I'm a sinful man .G D Covered by the blood of the Lamb [P] .Em D G Em D G Now I've found the greatest love of all is mine . Am Since You laid down Your life . C C/B C D The greatest sacrifice
[C] .G D Em C Majesty, Majesty . G D Your grace has found me just as I am . Em C Empty handed but alive in Your hands
[V2] Here I am, humbled by the love that You give Forgiven so that I can forgive Here I stand, knowing that I'm Your desire Sanctified by Glory and Fire
[B] Majesty, Majesty Forever I am changed by Your love In the presence of Your Majesty
